testcase.name: test_analytics_full_key_coverage

failure.message: AssertionError: Analytics missing keys: ['partiallySeatedSubmissions'] assert not ['partiallySeatedSubmissions']

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase6_extended.py:64: in test_analytics_full_key_coverage assert not missing, f"Analytics missing keys: {missing}" E AssertionError: Analytics missing keys: ['partiallySeatedSubmissions'] E assert not ['partiallySeatedSubmissions']
